description: Avalara provides tax calculation, compliance, returns, e-invoicing, and related tax-data products for businesses. Its developer portal covers APIs and AI integration endpoints for multiple Avalara product lines.
summary: Avalara exposes HTTP APIs for products including AvaTax REST v2 and Avalara 1099 & W-9, plus MCP/A2A endpoints under mcp.avalara.com and avi.avalara.com; confirmed auth includes AvaTax Basic auth and 1099 client credentials, while broader catalog and MCP auth details were not fully documented in the pages found.
